'''E-mail''' tab in '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]]''' : '''[[Options]]''' provides options for sending email from SuperMemo.

[[Image:Options email.jpg|800px|center|SuperMemo: E-mail options in Toolkit : Options]]

* '''Default mail protocol'''
** '''Default mail client''' - SuperMemo will send simple email using your default mail program
** '''Secure SMTP (with formatting and attachments)''' - you may use SuperMemo as your mailing program using the secure [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Simple_Mail_Transfer_Protocol SMTP] protocol. Despite the name, the method is not secure as SuperMemo is not a safe guardian of your private data (e.g. mail password). Use this method only if the other two cannot be used
** '''Simple MAPI (with attachments)''' - as in previous SuperMemos, if your mailing program supports [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/MAPI MAPI], use it to maximize the range of available options, esp. if you forward your [[Glossary:Element|element]]s or objects to friends

* '''SMTP data''' - data needed to use '''Secure SMTP'''
** '''Username''' - the username used to authenticate with the SMPT mail server
** '''Password''' - the password used to authenticate with the SMPT mail server. '''Warning!''' SuperMemo saves your password using weak encryption. Do not trust SuperMemo with mission-critical data!
** '''SMTP host''' - the name of the SMPT mail server (e.g. ''smpt.gmail.com'')
** '''Port''' - the port used to submit an outgoing email to the SMPT mail server (e.g. ''587'' for encrypted email transmissions using SMTP Secure (SMTPS))
